# ENGINEERING HANDOFF TEMPLATE

## Purpose

This template helps a Product Manager hand work to engineering without passing vague ambiguity downstream.

## Definition of Ready

A ticket is ready for engineering when:

- the user story is clear;
- product decisions are documented;
- acceptance criteria are testable;
- dependencies are known;
- out-of-scope items are explicit;
- open questions are assigned to an owner.

## Definition of Done

A ticket is done when:

- acceptance criteria are met;
- edge cases are handled or documented;
- product has reviewed the behavior;
- QA or equivalent validation is complete;
- relevant logs or audit events are implemented if required.
